columns.name: Timestamp
columns.description: Date and time when the record was generated

columns.name: Application
columns.description: Application that performed the recorded action

columns.name: ApplicationId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the application

columns.name: IsManagedIdentity
columns.description: Indicates whether the sign-in was initiated by a managed identity

columns.name: ErrorCode
columns.description: Contains the error code if a sign-in error occurs. To find a description of a specific error code, visit https://aka.ms/AADsigninsErrorCodes .

columns.name: CorrelationId
columns.description: Unique identifier of the sign-in event

columns.name: ServicePrincipalName
columns.description: Name of the service principal that initiated the sign-in

columns.name: ServicePrincipalId
columns.description: Unique identifier of the service principal that initiated the sign-in

columns.name: ResourceDisplayName
columns.description: Display name of the resource accessed. The display name can contain any character.

columns.name: ResourceId
columns.description: Unique identifier of the resource accessed

columns.name: ResourceTenantId
columns.description: Unique identifier of the tenant of the resource accessed

columns.name: IPAddress
columns.description: IP address assigned to the endpoint and used during related network communications

columns.name: Country
columns.description: Two-letter code indicating the country/region where the client IP address is geolocated

columns.name: State
columns.description: State where the sign-in occurred, if available

columns.name: City
columns.description: City where the account user is located

columns.name: Latitude
columns.description: The north to south coordinates of the sign-in location

columns.name: Longitude
columns.description: The east to west coordinates of the sign-in location

columns.name: RequestId
columns.description: Unique identifier of the request

columns.name: ReportId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the event

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: Exported telemetry timestamp observed in real Entra service principal sign-in telemetry

columns.name: IsConfidentialClient
columns.description: Indicates whether the sign-in used a confidential client

columns.name: GatewayJA4
columns.description: JA4-style gateway fingerprint observed in real exported telemetry

columns.name: SessionId
columns.description: Session identifier for service principal sign-ins where session context is present

columns.name: UserAgent
columns.description: User agent supplied by the service principal or managed identity client

columns.name: TenantId
columns.description: Tenant identifier when present in exported telemetry

columns.name: Type
columns.description: Table type label from exported telemetry

columns.name: SourceSystem
columns.description: Source system when present in exported telemetry

columns.name: UniqueTokenId
columns.description: Unique token identifier associated with the service principal sign-in
